title: rubus hindii
intro: Rubus hindii, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and its roots are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hindii include reducing fever, alleviating diarrhea and dysentery, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus hindii include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
